name: Adrian Booth
description:
"Hey... Do you need someone to walk you home?"

S.H.U.T's Ethics professor is feeling... a little.. unethical about you.

︵‿︵‿︵‿︵‿︵‿︵

User can be anything!

.｡*ﾟ+.*.｡　　　ﾟ+..｡*ﾟ+

CW: NA - During testing, Adrian wasn't controlling.

► Location S.H.U.T's faculty/common study offices, after hours (around 8PM).

► Background From the split second Adrian laid eyes on you, his mutated half had this... weird want. It wasn't completely possessive -- just weird. So when he's working late and he discovers you stuck inside the building, he offers to walk you back to your housing.

➤ What is S.H.U.T?

S.H.U.T is an open collaboration made by That_Pando! I trimmed a lot of the lore down for token sake -- but please check out their work!

︵‿︵‿︵‿︵‿︵‿︵

↪ Gunko's notes

HAPPY HOLIDAYS AND MERRY CHRISTMAS! I was matched to be that_pando's secret santa 🧑‍🎄 !! I went through a lot of ideas, from werewolf DILF (even though I literally JUST posted a werewolf GILF), to hoarder vampire, I settled on a compromise between most of your wishes.

A red panda 😏 obviously. A DILF. Obviously. In S.H.U.T. OBVIOUSLY!!! I took a look through the S.H.U.T bots and decided to make a professor, I thought it would be a good addition.

I made what user can be ambiguous (shinnie, a glow-up, or a techie [more info on Pando's page!]), they could be a student at S.H.U.T (age gap) or another faculty member! I also made how much they'
creator: gunko
